pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on JDK 21 due to internal API changes.

src/main/java/org/example/rentoza/bookin.general_idea: Replace wildcard Lombok import with explicit imports for specific annotations.

src/main/java/org/example/rentoza/car/Ca.general_idea: Replace wildcard Lombok import with explicit imports for specific annotations.

src/main/java/org/example/rentoza/file/F.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for Java 11+ compatibility.
Remove unused import java.nio.file.Paths after migration to Path.of().

src/main/java/org/example/rentoza/review.general_idea: Replace wildcard Lombok import with explicit imports for specific annotations.
Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to align with Java 21 API additions.

src/main/java/org/example/rentoza/user/U.general_idea: Replace wildcard import of Lombok annotations with explicit individual imports.
